# Paths that must never be overwritten by upstream auto-sync.
# On merge conflict, these files always keep the fork version (ours).
# Other conflicting files take upstream (theirs).
#
# Note: metadata.yaml is intentionally NOT fully protected so version can track upstream.
# The sync workflow rewrites author/repo to this fork after every merge.

core/generation/image_processor.py
core/generation/reference_collector.py
CHANGELOG.md
.github/FORK_PROTECTED_FILES.txt
.github/workflows/sync-upstream.yml
